title: Message/set destroy has no ownership check; any client can delete any message
description: daemon/src/jmap.rs:2191-2208: the destroy section of message_set calls store.hard_delete_message(id) with no check that the requesting account is the sender of the message. Any authenticated JMAP client can delete any message by ID, including messages from other senders. Root cause: missing sender_id == account_id guard before hard_delete_message. Fix: fetch the message sender_id from the store before deletion; return {type:'forbidden'} in notDestroyed if sender_id \!= account_id.
